reason: Online PPO + lambda_il=0.1 (extreme IL anchor reduction) failed to improve over v07d5/v07d7 baselines. Inference-feature winner_margin=-0.0012, below both v07d5 baseline (-0.0009) and v07d7 baseline (+0.0059). lambda_il=0.1 is too weak — the policy drifted too far from IL without finding genuine winner-selection signal. Stored margin turned positive late (iter 40+ wm=0.010→0.005) but inference margin stayed negative throughout. Confirms that lambda_il=0.5 (v07d7) is the better operating point. All hard gates passed.
artifact_reuse: v06d18 IL weights (IL init); fresh online game collection

training_summary.rl_algo: online PPO (PPO clip=0.2, 4 epochs per iter)
training_summary.forgetting_note: lambda_il=0.1 too weak. Policy drifted significantly from IL (loss 1.598→1.281) without achieving positive inference wm. Stored margin recovered at late iters (40+) but inference remained negative.

exploration_summary: lambda_il=0.1 with online PPO failed. Too weak IL anchor allows excessive policy drift without winner-selection benefit. lambda_il=0.5 (v07d7) appears to be the sweet spot. Next conservative experiment: lambda_il=0.3 to test the midpoint between 0.1 (failed) and 0.5 (succeeded). Note: episode buffer (489k decisions) saved for potential offline PPO reuse.
known_risks: lambda_il=0.1 insufficient: policy lost IL grounding before RL could compensate
Win rate improved (0.25→0.29) suggesting game-level learning, but not winner-selective
Stored margin recovered late but inference margin negative: generalization gap remains
Only 50 iters — if more iters allowed, might eventually recover (at cost of longer training)
next_candidates: [conservative] v07d9: online PPO + lambda_il=0.3; midpoint between failed 0.1 and successful 0.5. Builds on v07d7 model weights as warmstart.
[aggressive] v07d9-dim96: remove dim96 from feature vector; retrain IL from scratch on 96-dim features. Eliminates leakage entirely.
[aggressive] v07d9-episodes: collect fresh episodes with v07d7 model, run offline PPO 8 epochs. Better behavioral policy = better episode distribution.
[conservative] v07d9-more-iters: extend online PPO to 100 iters at lambda_il=0.5; late-iter margin showed upward trend in v07d7.
